subtitle.en: Describe how a business creates, delivers, and captures value in 9 blocks
subtitle.zh: 用 9 个模块描述业务如何创造、交付并获取价值

business-model-environment.en: External forces (trends, market, industry, macro) that pressure the model. Use it to surface risks BMC can't see.
business-model-environment.zh: 外部力量(趋势 / 市场 / 行业 / 宏观),压在模型四周。BMC 看不见的风险靠它暴露。

value-proposition-canvas.en: Zoom into one Customer Segment + its Value Proposition. Build one VPC per segment that matters.
value-proposition-canvas.zh: 对一个客户细分 + 它的价值主张做深度展开。每个值得做的细分配一张 VPC。

portfolio-map.en: Plot multiple BMCs against each other (existing vs new, mature vs experimental) to compare strategy posture.
portfolio-map.zh: 把多张 BMC 摆在一起比(成熟 vs 探索、现有 vs 新增),用于战略组合的取舍。

design-criteria-canvas.en: Make the constraints and aspirations explicit before designing the next model iteration.
design-criteria-canvas.zh: 在画下一版模型之前,把约束和理想先写清楚。

experiment-canvas.en: Pick the riskiest assumptions on the BMC and design a cheap test for each.
experiment-canvas.zh: 挑出 BMC 上最致命的假设,为每条设计最便宜的实验。
